ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Name of the administrative area (e.g., county) */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* State or province name */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region this data belongs to */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the data */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Current active cases */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total tests conducted in the region */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests (percentage) */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the last update date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the last update date */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on the last update date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which this testing data applies */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total positive cases from the tests */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date when testing was conducted */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests (percentage) */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted on the testing date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which this data applies */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total individuals vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when vaccination data was reported */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "new_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations reported on the vaccination date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms_data" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which this symptom data applies */,
  "symptom_type" TEXT /* Type of symptom reported (e.g., cough, fever) */,
  "reported_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reporting this symptom */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom data was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reporting this symptom on the report date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare resource record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region this resource belongs to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare resource (e.g., beds, ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the resource availability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, in use) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_resources_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., hospital, health department) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., governmental, private) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the data source */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_data" (
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry of source data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with this data */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data reported (e.g., confirmed, deaths) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the reported data */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., hospital, health department) */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* Number of new values reported on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
